/usr/bin/ar qc libnpp-qt-test-lib-gui.a "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/npp-qt-test-lib-gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/NppDarkMode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/WinControls/ImageListSet.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/WinControls/StaticDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/lesDlgs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/WinControls/ColourPicker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/WinControls/ColourPicker/ColourPopup.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/__/src/WinControls/CustomFileDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/npp-qt-test-lib-gui.dir/moc_Window.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libnpp-qt-test-lib-gui.a
